notes: Recognizably the same Loligo from the photo with fin, mantle and tentacle arrangement preserved, but linework is double-traced and noisy with weak eye and no sucker rings.
specific_issues: double-traced jagged silhouette instead of single continuous contour
photo-trace noise along mantle and arm edges
eye reduced to tiny dot, not almond with filled pupil
no ring-suckers indicated on arms or tentacular clubs
arm/tentacle interior detail collapses into blobby contours
stipple is scattered rather than concentrated in chromatophore fields
